footer.tagline: Your AI employee that answers calls, texts, and emails around the clock, on infrastructure dedicated to your business.

home.metaDescription: New Coworker gives your business a 24/7 AI employee to answer calls, handle messages, book appointments, and keep operations moving.
home.heroSubtitle: New Coworker answers calls, texts, and emails around the clock: booking appointments, following up with leads, and remembering every customer. Built for all businesses.
home.callDemoTitle: Don't take our word for it — call our AI coworker
home.callDemoBody: Our own coworker answers this line 24/7. Ask it anything about New Coworker: what it can do, pricing, how setup works. It can even text you a follow-up.
home.featuresSubtitle: Not a chatbot. A trained coworker that answers, acts, books, and follows up across every channel.
home.howSubtitle: Signup to first answered call is fully automated. No IT project, no sales call required.
home.privacyTitle: Your business runs on its own private server
home.privacyBody: Unlike shared AI platforms, every New Coworker business gets its own dedicated server running its AI coworker, with its own credentials and configuration. Your data is isolated per business, never shared with other companies, and always yours.
home.plansTeaser: A fraction of the cost of a receptionist or answering service, with a 30-day money-back guarantee on every plan.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to hire your New Coworker?
home.ctaSubtitle: New coworker starts learning from day one.
home.ogTitle: Your AI employee that never sleeps
home.ogDescription: Answer calls, texts, and emails around the clock with New Coworker.

stats.stat1Label: Every call and text answered: nights, weekends, holidays
stats.stat2Label: Handled at once, so there are no busy signals during your rush
stats.stat3Label: Everyday apps connected through Zapier, no code required
stats.stat4Label: Dedicated to your business, so business stays your business

voiceCoworker.title: AI Voice Coworker
voiceCoworker.description: Answers every call 24/7 with human-level conversation. It qualifies callers, checks your calendar, and books appointments on the spot.

warmTransfer.title: Warm Call Transfers
warmTransfer.description: When a caller needs you, your coworker transfers the call to you or your team with full context. No cold handoffs.

textingRcs.title: Texting, RCS & Auto-Replies
textingRcs.description: Two-way SMS and RCS messaging, texts sent during live calls, auto-text on missed calls, plus scheduled texts and saved templates.

callSummaries.title: AI Call Summaries & Sentiment
callSummaries.description: Every call lands on your dashboard with an AI summary and caller sentiment, so you know what happened without replaying audio.

analyticsAlerts.title: Analytics & Alerts
analyticsAlerts.description: Call trends, peak hours, and answer rate at a glance, with alerts when callers are turned away so you never miss a spike.

automatedWorkflows.title: Automated Workflows
automatedWorkflows.description: AiFlows capture leads from Meta (Facebook & Instagram) ads and text them back in seconds, follow up on schedule, route to your team, and run browser tasks.

appIntegrations.title: 8,000+ App Integrations
appIntegrations.description: Connect your coworker to Zapier, Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, and your CRM. One connection unlocks 8,000+ everyday business apps.

permanentMemory.title: Permanent Memory
permanentMemory.description: Lossless memory learns your business over time so every call, text, and email builds on real context. Nothing gets forgotten.

appointmentBooking.title: Appointment Booking
appointmentBooking.description: Your coworker finds open slots on your Google or Microsoft calendar and books them mid-call, then sends the confirmation for you.

complianceGuardrails.title: Compliance Guardrails
complianceGuardrails.description: Built-in compliance guardrails, including Fair Housing rules for real estate, protect your business from costly violations.

yourDashboard.title: Your Dashboard
yourDashboard.description: Monitor calls, messages, and emails, review memory, manage notifications and billing. All in one place, on any device.

deployMinutes.title: Deploy in Minutes
deployMinutes.description: One-click provisioning: your tailored assistant, dedicated server, and phone number are live minutes after signup.

step1.title: Tell us about your business
step1.description: Pick a plan and answer a short questionnaire. Your coworker learns your services, hours, and how you like to work. It can even read your website.

step2.title: We provision everything
step2.description: A dedicated private server, a phone number (or bring your own), email, and your trained AI coworker, all set up automatically.

step3.title: Your coworker gets to work
step3.description: Calls answered, texts returned, appointments booked, leads followed up, around the clock. You watch it all from your dashboard.

privacyBullets.dedicated: Dedicated private server per business with no shared tenancy
privacyBullets.isolated: Conversations and business records isolated per business, exportable any time
privacyBullets.memory: Permanent, lossless memory that stays under your control
privacyBullets.security: Deny-by-default security posture with per-business credentials

auth.magicLinkSent: Check your email for a magic link.

settings.accountBlurb: Plan, billing, login email, and password
settings.languageBlurb: Choose the language for your dashboard and emails. English is the default unless you change it here.

contacts.languageHelp: Language your AI coworker uses with this contact. Override detection if needed.

common.urgentBody: Your AI Coworker flagged an urgent event: {summary}

provisioningLive.subject: Your AI Coworker is live!
provisioningLive.body: Your New Coworker is set up and ready.
